strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform running on Kubernetes and used in production by Green Map
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale — AI-related work only began in April 2025
Career trajectory tops out at Senior/Staff engineer; no evidence of director-level scope, organization-wide strategy, or advising strategic customers/partners
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployments) is applied rather than platform-strategy level

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
15+ years engineering experience with founder/startup background

response.justification: The candidate clearly meets the minimum bar: a BS in Computer Science and roughly 20 years of engineering experience spanning low-latency DLang microservices at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/second) to full-stack TypeScript product work. The founder role at GISCollective evidences the preferred entrepreneurial trait. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position, and the résumé shows AI involvement only since April 2025 (MCP tooling at re:cinq), with no shipped AI products, publications, or public recognition in AI — talks listed cover GIS, web internals, and testing. There is also no evidence of operating at principal/director scope, setting product strategy, or advising external strategic customers. Strong senior engineer, but the two highest-weighted competencies for this role are absent, so the fit is low.
